commands.review_summary:
The branch adds raw resolved `sessionFile` paths as candidates whenever `resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates()` classifies them as stale.

PR surface: Source +11. Total +11 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source shows stale UUID-mismatched `sessionFile` values are routed through the contained resolver and the original outside legacy path is not preserved; the PR body also includes after-fix terminal output for the positive case.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is a narrow mechanical repair: constrain the new raw stale-path candidate to OpenClaw-owned legacy transcript roots and add focused regression tests.

target.title: #91868: Include raw stale path in transcript candidate resolution
target.body:
## Summary

Fix `resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates()` to include the raw stale `sessionFile` path when the file UUID doesn't match the current session ID and the path points outside the agent sessions tree. Without this, legacy `.jsonl` transcript files at `~/.openclaw/sessions/` (pre-per-agent migration) are silently dropped from the candidate list, never archived during session reset, and persist on disk.

## Root Cause

When a session entry's `sessionFile` references a path whose basename UUID doesn't match the current `sessionId` (classified as "stale"), `resolveSessionFilePath()` is called but may throw when the path lies outside the agent sessions directory tree (e.g. a legacy `~/.openclaw/sessions/<uuid>.jsonl` path from before the per-agent filing overhaul). The `pushCandidate()` wrapper silently catches the throw, dropping the stale path from the candidate list entirely. The legacy fallback at the end of the function generates a path from `sessionId`, not from the original stale path, so it can't compensate.

## Real behavior proof

### behavior
Include the raw resolved `sessionFile` path as an explicit candidate whenever the file is classified as "stale", ensuring the archive step can still find and rename the old transcript regardless of directory layout.

### environment
- OS: Linux 4.19.112
- Runtime: Node.js via tsx
- Setup: openclaw workspace, imports production `resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates` module

### steps
1. Create a `.jsonl` transcript file in a legacy-style directory outside the agent sessions tree, named with UUID `11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111`
2. Call `resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates()` with `sessionId=22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222` and `sessionFile` pointing to the legacy file
3. Check whether the legacy path appears in the returned candidates
4. Same test with a stale path inside the same agent dir

### observedResult

**Reproduction script output:**
```
═══ Scenario 1: stale legacy path (outside agent sessions dir) ═══
  sessionId:   22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222
  sessionFile: /tmp/oc-repro-legacy-3202496/11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111.jsonl
  candidates (4):
    [     ] /tmp/oc-repro-agent-3202496/22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222.jsonl
    [EXISTS] /tmp/oc-repro-legacy-3202496/11111111-1111-4111-8111-111111111111.jsonl
    [     ] /home/0668001315/.openclaw/agents/default/sessions/22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222.jsonl
    [     ] /home/0668001315/.openclaw/sessions/22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222.jsonl
  => raw stale path in candidates: true

═══ Scenario 2: stale path within same agent dir ═══
  sessionId:   22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222
  sessionFile: /tmp/oc-repro-agent-3202496/33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333333333.jsonl
    [     ] /tmp/oc-repro-agent-3202496/22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222.jsonl
    [EXISTS] /tmp/oc-repro-agent-3202496/33333333-3333-4333-8333-333333333333.jsonl
    [     ] /home/0668001315/.openclaw/agents/default/sessions/22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222.jsonl
    [     ] /home/0668001315/.openclaw/sessions/22222222-2222-4222-8222-222222222222.jsonl
  => stale + current both present: true

PASS
```

**Test suite:**
```
 ✓ resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates > fallback candidate uses OPENCLAW_HOME instead of os.homedir()
 ✓ resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates safety > keeps cross-agent absolute sessionFile candidate (...)
 ✓ resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates safety > drops unsafe session IDs instead of producing traversal paths
 ✓ resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates safety > drops unsafe sessionFile candidates and keeps safe fallbacks
 ✓ resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates safety > prefers the current sessionId transcript before a stale sessionFile candidate
 ✓ resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates safety > keeps explicit custom sessionFile ahead of synthesized fallback
 ✓ resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates safety > keeps custom topic-like transcript paths ahead of synthesized fallback
 ✓ resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates safety > keeps forked transcript paths ahead of synthesized fallback
 ✓ resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates safety > keeps timestamped custom transcript paths ahead of synthesized fallback
 ✓ resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates safety > still treats generated topic transcripts from another session as stale

 Test Files  3 passed
      Tests  33 passed
```

**Production change:**
```diff
--- a/src/gateway/session-transcript-files.fs.ts
+++ b/src/gateway/session-transcript-files.fs.ts
@@ -99,11 +99,21 @@ export function resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates(
       pushCandidate(() =>
         resolveSessionFilePath(sessionId, { sessionFile }, { sessionsDir, agentId }),
       );
+      // When the session file path is stale (filename UUID doesn't match the
+      // current session ID), resolveSessionFilePath may fall through to a
+      // generated path under the sessions dir if the stale file path points
+      // outside the agent sessions tree (e.g., a legacy ~/.openclaw/sessions/
+      // path from before the per-agent filing overhaul).  Include the raw
+      // path as an additional candidate so the archive step can still find
+      // and rename the old transcript file on disk.
+      pushCandidate(() => path.resolve(sessionFile));
     }
   } else if (sessionFile) {
     if (agentId) {
       if (sessionFileState !== "stale") {
         pushCandidate(() => resolveSessionFilePath(sessionId, { sessionFile }, { agentId }));
+      } else {
+        pushCandidate(() => path.resolve(sessionFile));
       }
     } else {
       const trimmed = sessionFile.trim();
@@ -117,6 +127,7 @@ export function resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates(
     pushCandidate(() => resolveSessionTranscriptPath(sessionId, agentId));
     if (sessionFile && sessionFileState === "stale") {
       pushCandidate(() => resolveSessionFilePath(sessionId, { sessionFile }, { agentId }));
+      pushCandidate(() => path.resolve(sessionFile));
     }
   }
```

## Regression Test Plan

- [x] `resolveSessionTranscriptCandidates` safety tests pass (all 10 existing tests + both stale-path scenarios verified via repro script)
- [x] `archiveSessionTranscriptsDetailed` archive events tests pass
- [x] `readSessionPreviewItemsFromTranscript` and related transcript reading tests pass
- [x] Change is minimal (11 insertions in one file) and targeted — only stale-path code branches are modified

*AI-assisted: built with Claude Code*
